## Content Task Submission

### Task Details

- **Task ID:** (e.g., TASK-06)
- **Task Title:** (e.g., Redbelly Insights Brand Intro Sequence)
- **Your Discord Handle:** (@username)
- **Your Wallet Address (for payment):** (0x...)

---

### Task 6: Video/Motion Graphics Checklist

- [ ] 1080p MP4 uploaded to YouTube
- [ ] **YouTube link:** (paste URL here)
- [ ] 4K MP4 available (link to Google Drive or equivalent)
- [ ] Open project files available (After Effects / Premiere Pro / Blender)
- [ ] Individual audio stems provided separately
- [ ] Audio licence documentation included (original or licensed - specify which)
- [ ] Duration is between 5 and 10 seconds exactly
- [ ] Audio mixed at -14 LUFS
- [ ] No render artefacts, clean motion blur, smooth easing
- [ ] Institutional aesthetic confirmed (appropriate for a financial compliance webinar)
- [ ] None of the following present: cartoon styles, meme references, hype aesthetics, laser eyes, rockets

---

### Task 12: Monthly Analytics Report Checklist

- [ ] **Month covered:** (e.g., April 2026)
- [ ] **Report submitted by 5th of following month:** Yes / No
- [ ] Follower count at start of month:
- [ ] Follower count at end of month:
- [ ] Net growth:
- [ ] Total impressions:
- [ ] Average engagement rate:
- [ ] Total link clicks:
- [ ] Top 3 performing posts: (paste links)
- [ ] Minimum 25 tweets posted this month: Yes / No
- [ ] Minimum 3 meaningful partner interactions this month: Yes / No
- [ ] Zero factual corrections required: Yes / No
- [ ] Blue Checkmark maintained throughout month: Yes / No
- [ ] Recommendations for next month: (brief summary)

---

### Notes for Reviewer

---

### Reviewer Use Only

- [ ] Deliverables complete
- [ ] Quality benchmarks met
- [ ] KPIs confirmed
- [ ] Approved / Revision requested
